svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="两种模式对比" id="modecompare"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-162" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="780" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="模式一:按租户打包(构建期)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="380" x="80" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="title2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="模式二:平台代开(运行期)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="380" x="640" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="一份源码" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="200" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vite" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Vite 插件
buildStart 改写 manifest.json
注入 AppId / tenantId" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="170" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pkgs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="N 个产物包
每个租户一个独立小程序" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="180" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cost1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="构建成本: O(N)
租户多了线性涨" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="200" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="src1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="vite"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="vite" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="pkgs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="pkgs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cost1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="一份源码" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="760" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tmpl" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="一份代码模板
所有租户共用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="750" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="commit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="微信 /wxa/commit
ext_json = { extAppid, ext:{tenantId} }
运行时 wx.getExtConfigSync()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="720" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tenants" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="N 个租户小程序
同一份代码,差异化靠 ext_json" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="740" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cost2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="构建成本: O(1)
租户再多代码也只一份" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="760" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e21" edge="1" parent="1" source="src2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="tmpl"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e22" edge="1" parent="1" source="tmpl" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="commit"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e23" edge="1" parent="1" source="commit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="tenants"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e24" edge="1" parent="1" source="tenants" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cost2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="divider" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;strokeWidth=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="570" y="30" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="510" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 190px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
